name: Microsoft Build Engine Loading Credential Libraries
description: This prompt detects the loading of credential-related libraries (`vaultcli.dll`, `SAMLib.DLL`) by the Microsoft Build Engine (`msbuild.exe`). This is a highly suspicious activity as attackers can use `msbuild.exe` to execute malicious code and dump credentials, which is a form of credential access. This prompt helps analysts investigate such events to determine if it is a legitimate activity or a credential theft attempt.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the security event where the Microsoft Build Engine (`{source_image}`) loaded a credential library (`{image}`). The event occurred at `{timestamp}` on the host `{hostname}`. Analyze the command line of the parent process and any other associated processes. Review the user (`{user}`) and the context of the activity. Determine if this is a legitimate software operation or a potential credential theft attempt. Provide a summary of your findings and suggest immediate mitigation steps.

parameters.name: source_image
parameters.description: The name of the process that loaded the DLL (should be msbuild.exe).

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The name of the DLL that was loaded (should be a credential library like vaultcli.dll or SAMLib.DLL).

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname where the event was detected.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.
